Name: Stone, Sky, Sea - Cloud of Darkness (Chaotic)
Description:
“<If(PlayerParameter(4))>She<Else/>He</If> who would allow eccentric researcher to modify durability of her striking dummies to match dread voidsent queen as fantastically reimagined in runaway mind of rambling bard is either great warrior or places great trust in scientific process.”

Embrace the esoterics of electrope engineers and destroy the striking dummy within the time limit!
